version.name: 0.34-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.34-beta Changelog :
Comprehensive code security and performance optimizations (ongoing). 全面的代码安全与性能优化（进行中）。
Refined Group button logic in the Preference window to ensure automatic application across all projects when enabled. 在偏好设置窗口中优化了分组按钮逻辑，确保启用时能自动应用于所有工程。
Fixed occasional crashes of the radial menu on macOS. 修复了 macOS 上径向菜单偶尔崩溃的问题。
Resolved an issue where certain UI elements would pop up automatically after REAPER was minimized. 修复了 REAPER 最小化后某些界面元素会自动弹出的问题。
Fixed potential process persistence issues during the shutdown sequence. 修复了关机流程中可能存在的进程驻留问题。
